basic_details.job_title: IIPS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 32 Office Assistant, IT Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Office Assistant, Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS), Project Accountant, Senior Project Accountant, Cook, Attendant, IT Engineer

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University with knowledge of computer applications, Minimum 10th Pass from a recognized Board, B.Com./BAF/BBA with one (01) year of experience, M.Com or B.Com/BAF/BBA with two (02) years of experience, Minimum 10th Pass with relevant experience in institutional kitchens, Minimum 10th Pass with experience in housekeeping, B.Tech/B.E with one year post qualification work experience in academic ERP system
qualification.details: Office Assistant: Graduate from a recognized University with knowledge of computer applications (MS Office, Email, Internet, etc.) and office procedures. Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS): Minimum 10th Pass from a recognized Board. Project Accountant: B.Com./BAF/BBA with one (01) year of experience. Senior Project Accountant: M.Com or B.Com/BAF/BBA with two (02) years of experience. Cook: Minimum 10th Pass with relevant experience in institutional kitchens, hostels, hotels, canteens or similar establishments. Preference will be given to those qualified professionals who have relevant experience in cooking. Attendant: Minimum 10th Pass with experience in housekeeping, hostel support services, office assistance or related work. IT Engineer: B.Tech/B.E and the candidate must have one year of post qualification work experience in an academic ERP system.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Ministry of Labour Law for Highly Skilled Category, As per Ministry of Labour Law for Semi-Skilled Category, As per Ministry of Labour Law for Skilled Category
salary_details.office assistant: As per Ministry of Labour Law for Highly Skilled Category
salary_details.multi-tasking staff (mts): As per Ministry of Labour Law for Semi-Skilled Category
salary_details.project accountant: As per Ministry of Labour Law for Highly Skilled Category
salary_details.senior project accountant: As per Ministry of Labour Law for Highly Skilled Category
salary_details.cook: As per Ministry of Labour Law for Skilled Category
salary_details.attendant: As per Ministry of Labour Law for Semi-Skilled Category
salary_details.it engineer: As per Ministry of Labour Law for Highly Skilled Category

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by IIPS?
faq.answer: IIPS has announced a total of 32 vacancies for various posts. These positions are available on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for IIPS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the IIPS recruitment is scheduled for 29 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification varies by post, ranging from 10th Pass to Graduate degrees like B.Com, BAF, BBA, M.Com, B.Tech, or B.E, along with relevant experience for some positions.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIPS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this IIPS recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will be as per the Ministry of Labour Law, categorized for Highly Skilled, Skilled, and Semi-Skilled categories depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the IIPS office in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400088.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates), and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the announced posts is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Who can apply for the IT Engineer post?
faq.answer: The IT Engineer post requires a B.Tech/B.E degree and at least one year of post-qualification work experience in an academic ERP system.
